title: Tata Communications is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Communications is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Tata Communications family as a Full Stack Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Tata Communications:
Tata Communications is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications!
